story_title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

relationships.description: Devoted gardener and most faithful companion
Gandalf guides Frodo and entrusts him with the Ring
Fellow member tempted by the Ring's power
Sworn to follow Frodo to the end
Entrusts Frodo with the Ring and guides his early journey
Long-standing ally in the fight against Sauron
Competing visions of leadership and duty
Wants the Ring, threatening the quest
The Ring connects Frodo to Sauron's will

places.name: The Shire
places.description: Gentle rolling hills, hobbit-holes, and pastoral farmland — a place of comfort and innocence.

places.name: Rivendell
places.description: Elven refuge hidden in a valley — a place of healing, council, and respite.

places.name: Mines of Moria
places.description: Abandoned dwarven kingdom beneath the mountains — dark, echoing with ancient evil.

places.name: Amon Hen
places.description: The Seat of Seeing above the Falls of Rauros — where the Fellowship breaks and paths diverge.

objects.name: The One Ring
objects.description: A plain gold band of immense power that corrupts all who bear it.
objects.significance: The quest's central burden — must be destroyed, not wielded. Its destruction is the objective.
rules: Can only be destroyed in Mount Doom

objects.name: Sting
objects.description: An Elven short sword that glows blue in the presence of orcs.
objects.significance: Gift from Bilbo — connects Frodo to his uncle's adventure and serves as warning system.
rules: Glows blue when orcs are near

objects.name: Mithril Coat
objects.description: A shirt of mithril rings, light as silk and hard as dragon scales.
objects.significance: Gift from Bilbo, saves Frodo's life in Moria — symbol of hidden protection.

moments.label: Bag End and Bilbo's Party
moments.description: Frodo lives peacefully in the Shire. Bilbo departs, leaving the Ring behind.

char_frodo.wants: a quiet life in the Shire
knows: nothing about the Ring's true nature

moments.label: Gandalf's Revelation
moments.description: Gandalf reveals the Ring's true identity and the threat of Sauron. Frodo must leave the Shire.

transitions.detail: The Ring is the One Ring of Sauron and must be destroyed

transitions.description: Accepts the burden of carrying the Ring away from the Shire

moments.label: The Council of Elrond
moments.description: At Rivendell, the Fellowship of nine is formed. Frodo volunteers to bear the Ring to Mordor.

transitions.description: Sam insists on going with Frodo
Bilbo gives Frodo the mithril coat
Volunteers to take the Ring to Mordor

moments.label: Journey Through Moria
moments.description: The Fellowship enters the Mines of Moria. They face orcs, a cave troll, and the ancient terror of the Balrog.

transitions.description: Fellowship enters the Mines of Moria

transitions.detail: The mithril coat saves his life from a cave troll's spear

moments.label: The Bridge of Khazad-dum
moments.description: Gandalf confronts the Balrog on the bridge, falls into the abyss, and the Fellowship is shattered by grief.

transitions.description: Falls with the Balrog into the depths of Moria
The Ring's burden becomes visible as grief and isolation grow

moments.label: Boromir's Temptation
moments.description: At Amon Hen, Boromir tries to take the Ring from Frodo. The quest's unity breaks down completely.

transitions.description: Attempts to take the Ring by force

transitions.detail: The Ring will corrupt even the most honorable companions

moments.label: The Breaking of the Fellowship
moments.description: Frodo decides to go to Mordor alone. Boromir redeems himself defending Merry and Pippin, dying in the attempt.

transitions.description: Chooses to continue the quest alone to protect his friends
Redeems himself defending the hobbits, killed by orc arrows
Accepts the full weight of the quest as a solitary burden

moments.label: Sam Joins Frodo
moments.description: Sam catches up with Frodo crossing the river. The quest continues with only two: Frodo and Sam heading for Mordor.

transitions.description: Refuses to let Frodo go alone — 'I made a promise'
Accepts Sam's companionship for the final road

moments.label: The Road Goes Ever On
moments.description: Frodo and Sam set off toward Mordor. The quest is not over, but the Fellowship's part of the journey is complete.

transitions.description: Leaves the Fellowship behind and heads for Mordor
